title: Work Order v1
description: A batch of on-site tasks assigned to an operator. Groups one or more items, each bound to exactly one plot and crop cycle so per-plot traceability survives batching (docs/16_OPERATOR_WORKFLOW.md).

workOrderId.description: Opaque public id of the work order.

status.description: Lifecycle state. NOTE: docs/04_DOMAIN_MODEL.md and docs/16_OPERATOR_WORKFLOW.md also use 'rejected' (operator declines an assignment); it is intentionally absent here pending Học's decision (docs/17_ERD_TELEMETRY_AUTOMATION_WORK_ORDERS.md §4.1, docs/13_ASSUMPTIONS_AND_OPEN_QUESTIONS.md). Until resolved, the contract keeps this narrower set.

assigneeId.description: Opaque public id of the assigned operator. Null until assigned.

statusReason.description: Human-readable reason. Required in practice for blocked or cancelled orders (docs/17 §2).

dueFrom.description: Start of the due window (RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 UTC), if scheduled.

dueTo.description: End of the due window (RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 UTC), if scheduled.

items.description: The tasks grouped by this order. At least one item.

plotId.description: Opaque public id of the plot this item is scoped to (exactly one).

cropCycleId.description: Opaque public id of the crop cycle this item is scoped to (exactly one).

taskType.description: Kind of on-site task. Allowed set from docs/17_ERD_TELEMETRY_AUTOMATION_WORK_ORDERS.md (work_order_items.task_type); maps from Category B/C actionTypes in docs/15_ACTION_CATALOG.md.

sourceRequestId.description: Opaque public id of the player_action_request that caused this item, if any, so the player can be shown the outcome.

createdAt.description: When the work order was created (RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 UTC).
